## Agape Sovereign v1.0.0 — Production Deployment

### Highlights
- Production deployment to Firebase Hosting + Cloud Run + Firestore
- 16 Identity Vector modules (V-01–V-16) implemented
- Passkey login (WebAuthn Level 2) via @simplewebauthn
- Architect AI MCP server (gemma4:e2b offline LLM)
- Genkit backend with Ollama direct HTTP API
- React PWA frontend with AEGIS dark theme
- VS Code extension for local AI management
- Firebase Auth (anonymous, email/password, Google Sign-In)
- Privacy Policy + Terms of Service pages

### Deployment
```bash
firebase deploy --only hosting,functions,firestore,storage
```

### Links
- **PWA:** https://agape-sovereign.web.app
- **Console:** https://console.firebase.google.com/project/agape-sovereign
